description.value: You're an insatiable student, determined to learn and experience everything you can, as quick as you can—even if the knowledge gained quickly gets buried under new information. During your daily preparations, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Additional Lore] feat with one Lore skill of your choice. This proficiency lasts until you prepare again. Since this proficiency is temporary, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a permanent character option, like a feat.
